category_sources: Official GitHub repository description matches Terraform module cleanup/unused variable detection.
source_facts.description: tiny utility that detects unused variables in Terraform modules.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the primary documentation surface; no separate docs URL was present in source_facts.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/sylwit/terraform-cleaner; per instruction, repo was not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies unused Terraform variable detection.
source_facts.executables lists terraform-cleaner as the CLI.
